findings.finding: Current local HEAD and remote refs/heads/bos/issue-51 could not be affirmatively re-confirmed as 40750c297ed42435dabe1d4670bfda85ce92af36. Both read-only git probes failed before Git executed because the command sandbox had no usable bubblewrap launcher; the BOS delivery projection identifies the branch but does not expose either current ref SHA.

The current patch from base commit 8c2ec23a4a7873890a81562a1e701efae684be34 to the requested HEAD could not be directly inspected because local file and Git access was unavailable, and no BOS artifact included the patch. Therefore architectural compliance with repository reservation, claim reconciliation, and GameApiTrackerAdapter boundaries lacks affirmative independent evidence.

Confirmed EvidenceReport evidence_issue_51_implementation_40750c29 is exact-commit bound and reports 363 passing tests, 100.00% coverage, strict Credo, Dialyzer, formatting, diff-check, and clean-worktree checks, plus targeted behavior for terminal, missing, unroutable, and valid capacity waiters. This is supportive but cannot substitute for current ref verification and independent architecture diff inspection.
Exact merged-artifact installation and service-health verification remain explicitly deferred to post-merge delivery coordination and are not evidence for this pre-merge architecture decision.

summary: Inconclusive: exact-commit implementation evidence is present and favorable, but the mandatory current local/remote SHA confirmation and independent patch inspection are unavailable, so an affirmative architecture pass cannot be issued.
